what: Incident response for FSC-2417: severity=P3 — verdict=MONITORING

triage_steps: Investigate why the post-release health check returned UNKNOWN and the monitor verdict was SKIPPED for FSC-2417 — check Copado pipeline logs and deployment job history for errors or timeouts.
Verify that the deployment for FSC-2417 completed successfully in the target org by reviewing Copado's deployment result records and Salesforce Setup > Deploy Status.
Re-run the post-release health check and monitoring suite manually for FSC-2417 to obtain a definitive pass/fail verdict.
Confirm no Apex test failures, validation errors, or Flow activation issues were silently swallowed during the deployment by inspecting the Salesforce debug logs and Copado result XML.

Review the FSC-2417 story scope — if it touches Suitability, Appropriateness, RiskProfile__c, VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c, or FinancialAccount data, escalate immediately to Compliance Officer and re-classify severity.

If health checks pass on re-run and no FCA-regulated objects are impacted, mark the SKIPPED verdict as a monitoring gap and raise a remediation task to ensure the health check pipeline cannot be silently skipped in future releases.
Document findings and update the FSC-2417 release record in Copado with the confirmed deployment status and health check outcome.
